lines.hearsay: There was an argument at {place} about a notice nobody in it had taken.
lines.gossip: {A} held the table at {place} on the subject of the posting {A} would have taken, and {B} waited for the very end before mentioning it had come down two days ago — {B} reads every notice twice and takes none, which is exactly why {B} knew.
lines.report: {A} disputed {B}'s account of a standing notice at {place}, slot {slot}.
